userStories.title: Diagnose and fix cron-psd2-weekly stale alert
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; BEFORE=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sync_log WHERE worker='cron-psd2-weekly'"); $COMPOSE run --rm cron-psd2-weekly 2>&1 | tail -20; AFTER=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sync_log WHERE worker='cron-psd2-weekly'"); [ "$AFTER" -gt "$BEFORE" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-SYNC-ENTRY

Final population report - all compliance tables

workerRemediationStories.title: Assess and wire high-priority AEAT/IRNR/DAC standalone workers
acceptanceCriteria: Official source URLs verified and documented
Run-once execution writes sync_log
Compose/systemd wiring added only when production-safe
MCP/API availability remains fail-closed until data is verified

acceptanceCriteria: Official CNMV/EUR-Lex/ESMA source boundaries verified
Idempotent writes and sync_log telemetry proven
Cron/systemd schedules justified by publication cadence
Domain availability metadata updated before exposing answers

workerRemediationStories.title: Assess and wire sustainability and insurance standalone workers

workerRemediationStories.title: Assess and wire banking, PBC and screening standalone workers
